about.address: Head office address: 4-2-8 Shiba Park, Minato-ku, Tokyo (tentative)
about.businessActivities: Business activities: Buying and selling brokerage, rental brokerage, property management, real estate consulting
about.companyName: Company name: Hare Real Estate Co., Ltd. (Japanese phonetic spelling: Hare Fudosan)
about.employeesCount: Number of employees: Approximately 180 (total for the entire group)
about.footerNote: License numbers, affiliated organizations, and complaint handling contact information are all consolidated in the footer. Please be sure to update this information to reflect the most current version in your actual work.
about.history2010: 2010: Founded in Minato-ku, Tokyo, starting business with rental brokerage
about.history2013: 2013: Established a sales division, fully entering the resale of used condominiums
about.history2016: 2016: Opened Osaka branch, expanding network in the Kansai region
about.history2019: 2019: Launched a relocation service for corporations
about.history2022: 2022: Released a beta version of the customer portal (unrelated to this site)
about.history2026: 2026: Released a demo Next.js app (this page)
about.locationText: We don't just rely on the sense of distance on the screen; we repeatedly verify the walking route.
about.locationTitle: Switching back and forth between the location and the map
about.metadataDescription: Here is an overview of Hare Real Estate Co., Ltd.'s mission, history, and key figures.
about.mission: Based on our belief that "a home is the stage for life," we propose living environments tailored to each customer's individual life stage. Our role is to articulate the balance between asset value and comfort, transcending the boundaries of buying and renting.
about.note: The company history, message from the representative, and organizational chart presented here are all placeholders. They are not related to any actual company. To ensure sufficient text length, the headings are arranged in a manner commonly seen in the industry.
about.teamText: To ensure the process can proceed even when the person in charge is absent, we will leave a record of the decision-making process in the notebook and CRM.
about.transparencyText: We will share important information at an early stage and ensure that we can track the history of drawing revisions and price changes.

aside.distanceInfo: I will provide you with notes on both the walking time from the station and the actual running time.
aside.explanation: This site is a learning demo for Next.js App Router. The listed prices, photos, and surrounding environment are fictitious examples.
aside.internationalSupport: We can also include English-language materials for our international customers.
aside.intro: Choose your home with the same lightheartedness as a sunny day.
aside.portfolioSupport: We can also help you organize your investment and personal property portfolios.
aside.sameDayConsultations: Same-day consultations with affiliated loan offices are available (may vary by area).

complianceBroker: Real Estate Broker: Tokyo Metropolitan Governor (1) No. 000000
complianceGuarantee: Guarantee Association: National Association of Real Estate Transaction Guarantee Associations
complianceHandling: Complaint handling: Please contact our customer service department.
developedBy: This project was developed by ☀️ Whimsical Tech for the accompanying blog post.

lastVisit.dateWarning: The displayed date is always today's date (local display for demo purposes)
lastVisit.mainText: Your last visit was {{date}}. Since then, {{count}} new listings have been added. In the list, listings with NEW are displayed at the top.

mainPage.disclaimer: Please refer to the land register and important matters explanation document for floor plans, floor area, and year of construction.
mainPage.filterNotice: The panel below displays the number of transactions in real time, broken down by three axes: transaction type, city, and number of rooms. All numbers are the result of client-side filtering.

office.closedOn: Closed on: Saturdays, Sundays, and public holidays
office.mainAddress: Head Office: 4-2-8 Shiba Park, Minato-ku, Tokyo

propertyCatalog.changeCriteria: Please change search parameters or start over.
propertyCatalog.resetNotice: After clearing the page, all items in the listed library will be displayed again.

propertyId.bathroom: Bathroom: This is dummy text assuming a modern bathroom with a ventilation and drying system.
propertyId.buildingPolicies: Please check the latest version of the management regulations from the management company regarding pet policies, musical instruments, office use, etc. The content written here is a placeholder.
propertyId.conveniences: This section contains standard phrases such as "walking time to the convenience store," "walking time to the supermarket," "walking time to the park," etc. In practice, please compare the measurements from the mapping software with the results of on-site verification.
propertyId.demoText: This plan aims to create a living environment where you can enjoy the contrast between the hustle and bustle of the area in front of the station and the tranquility that unfolds just a step away.
propertyId.kitchen: Kitchen: We propose a layout that allows family members to see each other, assuming an open-plan design.
propertyId.lightAndAirflow: Since morning light and airflow are difficult to convey from floor plans alone, we recommend checking the condition of the curtains during your viewing (this is a general rule).
propertyId.photoNotice: The photos shown are for illustrative purposes only. Furniture and furnishings are not included in the sales price. For rental properties, please refer to the separate document for estimated costs of restoring the property to its original condition.
propertyId.priceNotice: The displayed price is a sample price. Consumption tax, common area maintenance fees, parking fees, etc. must be confirmed separately.
propertyId.priceOnContact: Please contact your representative for pricing.
propertyId.redevelopment: If there are any rebuilding or redevelopment plans in the surrounding area, please conduct interviews with potential buyers or tenants yourself (template wording).
propertyId.renovationNotice: (Renovation history is assumed to be in a separate document)
propertyId.schoolInfo: School district information is not included. If necessary, please refer to the publicly available information from the Board of Education and add a note.
propertyId.storagePlan: Storage plan: Based on adjustable shelves, with a focus on creating a flow that avoids placing seasonal appliances on the floor.
